_description: Jeep Cherokee focused testbed bindings aligned to the reconstructed TARA-style threat model.
_protocol_note: D-Bus over TCP 6667 models the exposed IVI service path. CONN_04 emulates the internal OMAP-to-V850 pivot. CONN_05~08 model CAN-C effects. CONN_09~10 model infotainment-side CAN-IHS effects.

_mode_note.hardened_target_state: Used to validate whether selected controls block the attack paths.
_mode_note.whitepaper_vulnerable_state: Used to reproduce the disclosed exploit behavior where the emulator supports it.

CONN_01._desc: Cellular channel to Uconnect head unit — D-Bus wire protocol (TCP 6667)

CONN_02._desc: D-Bus IPC service on Uconnect head unit — D-Bus wire protocol (TCP 6667)
CONN_02._modeling_note: Logical same-host D-Bus service exposure. Although the service runs on OMAP_Processor, it is treated as a remotely reachable endpoint for attack-step binding and should not be interpreted as a physical hop.

CONN_04._desc: SPI channel: OMAP to V850 — simulated via vcan0
CONN_04.emulation_note: This connection emulates the internal OMAP-to-V850 pivot rather than reproducing the original physical firmware-flash process exactly.

CONN_05._desc: CAN-C: V850 to ABS ECU (arb_id 0x07B) via socketcand

CONN_06._desc: CAN-C: V850 to EPS ECU (arb_id 0x292) via socketcand

CONN_07._desc: CAN-C: V850 to TCM ECU (arb_id 0x0F0) via socketcand

CONN_08._desc: CAN-C: V850 to PCM ECU (arb_id 0x208) via socketcand

CONN_09._desc: CAN-IHS: V850 to HVAC ECU (arb_id 0x3B3) via socketcand

CONN_10._desc: CAN-IHS: V850 to Audio Amplifier ECU (arb_id 0x3D2) via socketcand

CONN_11._desc: DoIP diagnostic gateway (ISO 13400-2) over TCP — UDS SecurityAccess / ECUReset path
CONN_11._modeling_note: Server emits secure-mode rejection (response code 0x04 / NRC 0x33) when ENABLE_DOIP_AUTH=true and the request lacks SecurityAccess. Vulnerable mode accepts zero seed and any key.

CONN_13._desc: OTA firmware update channel — plain HTTP (no TLS) for transport-bypass scenarios; emulator listens on 6669 only when ENABLE_TLS=false
CONN_13._modeling_note: Active only when AvnEcuService.ENABLE_TLS=false; otherwise CONN_03 (HTTPS 8444) is the active OTA endpoint. Use this for TS_06.T2/T3 transport-bypass paths.

CONN_12._desc: SOME/IP service-oriented endpoint (AUTOSAR) over TCP — VehicleStatusService method invocation
CONN_12._modeling_note: Server returns return-code 0x15 ACCESS_DENIED on every method when ENABLE_SOMEIP_AUTH=true. Vulnerable mode executes the method and returns 0x00 OK. No SD (Service Discovery) over UDP — client connects directly to the TCP port.

_generalized_tree_note: Bindings below support generalized attack trees with reusable leaf steps. A single connection may be reused by multiple step nodes and multiple attack paths.
